name: Adrian chase
description:
✧.* He might've told his mom that you and him were dating...

Ignore how dark the pfp, it wouldn't let me do it normally 💔

Spoilers for season 2 and episode 6, kinda. This is pretty based on that episode, so I recommend watching that first if you haven't yet.

This is lowkey pretty different than how I usually make bots, so it might be weird! I'm sorry if there's any problems, but I tried pretty hard and got good responses while testing with JLLM so... So I'm kinda happy with it. And he's really good with proxy, so I recommend using that instead of jllm. also didn't state anything about user but that they weren't dating Adrian

Song: paycheck 2 paycheck — hot freaks. (Doesn't really fit the scenario, but it gives me Hella Adrian chase vibes.)

Dc

Tell me if there's any mistakes!
creator: Freal
